## Outcome

<!-- What user-visible or engineering outcome does this produce? -->

## Scope

- [ ] One coherent change; unrelated work excluded
- [ ] Roadmap/backlog status updated when applicable
- [ ] DEVLOG and CURRENT_WORK updated

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Browser/mobile review when UI changed
- [ ] RLS/storage negative tests when data access changed
